name: ISO 9001:2015
description: ISO 9001:2015 is the international standard that specifies requirements for a quality management system (QMS). Organizations use the standard to demonstrate the ability to consistently provide products and services that meet customer and regulatory requirements.
whyItMatters: This certification ensures we maintain consistent quality across all our production processes. Our clients can trust that every order meets the highest international quality standards, reducing defects and ensuring reliable delivery.

name: ISO 14001:2015
description: ISO 14001:2015 sets out the criteria for an environmental management system and can be certified to. It maps out a framework that a company or organization can follow to set up an effective environmental management system.
whyItMatters: This certification demonstrates our commitment to reducing environmental impact. We continuously monitor and improve our processes to minimize waste, reduce water consumption, and lower our carbon footprint—meeting the sustainability expectations of modern brands.

name: OEKO-TEX Standard 100
fullName: OEKO-TEX Standard 100 Product Class I & II
description: OEKO-TEX Standard 100 is one of the world's best-known labels for textiles tested for harmful substances. It stands for customer confidence and high product safety.
whyItMatters: This certification guarantees that our textiles are free from harmful chemicals and safe for human use—especially critical for children's clothing and products that come in direct contact with skin. Many retailers require OEKO-TEX certification for product safety assurance.

name: GOTS
issuingBody: Global Organic Textile Standard International Working Group
description: The Global Organic Textile Standard (GOTS) is the worldwide leading textile processing standard for organic fibres, including ecological and social criteria, backed up by independent certification of the entire textile supply chain.
whyItMatters: GOTS certification is the gold standard for organic textiles. It ensures our organic cotton products meet strict environmental and social criteria throughout the entire supply chain—from harvesting to manufacturing. Brands targeting conscious consumers require GOTS certification.

name: BSCI
description: BSCI is a leading business-driven initiative for improving working conditions in the global supply chain. The amfori BSCI Code of Conduct is based on international labour standards.
whyItMatters: This certification proves we maintain fair working conditions, safe environments, and ethical labor practices. Major retailers and brands require BSCI compliance to ensure their supply chain partners treat workers fairly and respect human rights.

name: WRAP
description: WRAP certification is designed to promote safe, lawful, humane and ethical manufacturing throughout the world. It is the world's largest independent certification program focused on the apparel, footwear and sewn products sectors.
whyItMatters: WRAP certification demonstrates our commitment to ethical manufacturing practices. We're independently verified to meet 12 principles covering labor practices, workplace safety, and environmental responsibility—critical for brands committed to responsible sourcing.

name: Disney FAMA
description: Disney FAMA is Disney's comprehensive compliance program for vendors producing Disney-branded merchandise. It includes strict requirements for safety, quality, and ethical manufacturing.
whyItMatters: Disney FAMA certification represents one of the industry's most rigorous compliance standards. It enables us to produce licensed Disney merchandise and demonstrates our capability to meet the highest safety and quality requirements—especially critical for children's products.

name: Sedex
description: Sedex is one of the world's leading online platforms for managing responsible supply chains. It helps companies manage their ethical and sustainable supply chains and provides a platform to share data.
whyItMatters: Sedex membership allows us to share our ethical and sustainability performance data transparently with our clients. Major retailers use Sedex to assess supplier compliance, making this essential for doing business with global brands.

name: GRS
description: The Global Recycled Standard (GRS) is an international, voluntary standard that sets requirements for third-party certification of recycled content, chain of custody, social and environmental practices and chemical restrictions.
whyItMatters: GRS certification validates our use of recycled materials and sustainable practices in production. As brands increasingly demand circularity and reduced virgin material use, this certification proves our ability to manufacture high-quality products from recycled content.

name: BGMEA
fullName: Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association
description: BGMEA membership and compliance certification ensures adherence to Bangladesh's garment industry standards and regulations, including building safety, fire safety, and worker welfare.
whyItMatters: As a BGMEA-certified member, we comply with Bangladesh's post-Rana Plaza safety reforms, including building inspections, fire safety systems, and worker rights protections. This demonstrates our commitment to safe manufacturing environments.
